summary: Backend-only verification of check_channel_membership fix: bot is 'left' in @thesvjbaris and 'administrator' in @thesvjduyuru (confirmed via Telegram API). Fix correctly skips channels where bot itself is not a member. All targeted endpoints behave as expected.
passed: POST /api/auth/verify-code with invalid code 'ZZZZZZ' -> 404 'Kod bulunamadı veya süresi doldu'

GET /api/auth/check-channels with X-User-Id of test user (telegram_id=99999999) -> 200 {'missing_channels':[], 'telegram_linked':true}. @thesvjbaris correctly OMITTED (bot is 'left' there, skipped). @thesvjduyuru also omitted because getChatMember returns ok=false for fake user_id -> code falls into 'skip on API error' branch (expected per request note).
POST /api/clips/{id}/vote with X-User-Id of user lacking telegram_id -> 403 detail={'error':'telegram_required','missing_channels':['@thesvjduyuru','@thesvjbaris']} — prior gating behavior preserved
notes: Test users (t1-tg-user, t1-no-tg-user) and test clip (t1-test-clip) inserted and cleaned up successfully (2 users + 1 clip deleted). Frontend not tested per request (testing_type=backend only).
